name: com.unity.2d.tilemap.extras
description:
2D Tilemap Extras is a package that contains extra scripts for use with 2D Tilemap features in Unity. These include custom Tiles and Brushes for the Tilemap feature.

The following are included in the package:
Brushes: GameObject Brush, Group Brush, Line Brush, Random Brush
Tiles: Animated Tile, Auto Tile, Rule Tile, Rule Override Tile
Other: Grid Information, Custom Rules for Rule Tile

samples.description: An example implementation of an Animated Tile.
An example implementation of a Rule Tile with rules matching four-way orthogonal neighbors.
An example implementation of a Rule Tile with rules matching eight-way orthogonal and diagonal neighbors.
An example implementation of Auto Tiles with 3x3 mask and a template.

_upm.changelog:
### Changed
- [AutoTile] Change uss for extra right margin for listview entries
- [RuleTileEditor] Add scrolling to Rules

### Fixed
- [AutoTile] Fix errors when used Sprites are deleted
- [AutoTileEditor] Fix previous entries remaining in AutoTile when loading a new template
- [GridInformation] Fix serialization warning
- [GroupBrush] Fix serialization warning
- [RuleTile] Fix serialization warning
- [RuleOverrideTile] Fix OnEnable warning
- [AutoTileEditor] Fix error when cancelling loading of AutoTileTemplate
- [LineBrushEditor] Fix start marquee when Grid has different cell sizes or Tilemap has a changed Transform
